enphaseR 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

List the Enphase systems your account can access

Source: R/systems.R
enphase_systems.Rd

Most homeowners have exactly one system; this is where to find its system_id for use with enphase_summary() and enphase_production().

Usage

enphase_systems(config_dir = NULL)

Arguments

config_dir

Directory for credential and token files. Defaults to the ENPHASER_CONFIG_DIR environment variable if set, otherwise tools::R_user_dir("enphaseR", "config").

Value

A tibble with one row per system, including system_id, name, status, and other fields returned by the API.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
enphase_systems()
} # }

On this page
